content.json:
## Indicator Overview
---

This tab depends on the **Cyjax IOC Data Connector**.</br>
Please configure the Data Connector (Function App) to enable indicator ingestion and allow this tab to visualize the data.
Total Indicator
Indicator Handling Condition Matrix

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| distinct CyjaxIOCUUID 
| count
| extend Count_Title = "Count"

CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where TLPLevel =~ "white"
| distinct CyjaxIOCUUID
| count
| extend HandlingCondition = "White"

CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where TLPLevel =~ "amber"
| distinct CyjaxIOCUUID
| count
| extend HandlingCondition = "Amber"

CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where TLPLevel =~ "green"
| distinct CyjaxIOCUUID
| count
| extend HandlingCondition = "Green"

CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where TLPLevel =~ "red"
| distinct CyjaxIOCUUID
| count
| extend HandlingCondition = "Red"

CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| summarize Count = count(CyjaxIOCUUID) by IndicatorType
content.title: Indicator Type Distribution

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| summarize Count = count(CyjaxIOCUUID) by TLPLevel
content.title: Handling Condition Breakdown

content.json: _Click on the sections in the above panel **Indicator Type Distribution** to view more information._
_Click on the sections in the above panel **Handling Condition Breakdown** to view more information._

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where IndicatorType == '{IndicatorType1}'
content.title: Indicator Details for Type : {IndicatorType1}

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where TLPLevel == '{TLPLevel1}'
content.title: Indicator Details for Handling Condition : {TLPLevel1}
Indicator Over Time

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    CreatedAt,
    IndicatorType,
    IndicatorValue,
    IndicatorName,
    Description,
    StixPattern,
    PatternType,
    PatternVersion,
    IndicatorCategories,
    CyjaxIOCUUID,
    CyjaxSource,
    CyjaxTTP,
    CyjaxIndustryType,
    CyjaxHandlingCondition,
    EnrichmentIOCType,
    EnrichmentIPAddress,
    EnrichmentCity,
    EnrichmentCountryName,
    EnrichmentCountryCode,
    EnrichmentASNOrg,
    EnrichmentASNNumber,
    EnrichmentSightingsCount,
    EnrichmentSightings,
    EnrichmentLastSeen,
    ModifiedAt,
    ValidFrom,
    ValidUntil,
    ObservableKey,
    ObservableValue,
    StixConfidence,
    Confidence,
    IsActive,
    IsDeleted,
    Revoked,
    TLPLevel,
    Labels,
    SourceName,
    SourceDescription,
    ReportURL,
    SourceSystem
content.title: Indicator Overview with Enrichment Details

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| extend CyjaxTTP = split(CyjaxTTP, ", ")
| mv-expand CyjaxTTP
| where isnotempty(CyjaxTTP)
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(CyjaxTTP)
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Top 10  TTP

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where isnotempty(EnrichmentASNOrg) 
| summarize  Count = count() by EnrichmentASNOrg
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Top 10 ASN

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| extend CyjaxIndustryType = split(CyjaxIndustryType, ", ")
| project CyjaxIndustryType
| mv-expand CyjaxIndustryType
| where isnotempty(CyjaxIndustryType) and CyjaxIndustryType != "Unknown"
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(CyjaxIndustryType)
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Industry Breakdown

content.json: _Click on the sections in the above panels **Top 10 TTP, Top 10 ASN, Industry Breakdown** to view more information._

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where CyjaxTTP contains '{CyjaxTTP}'
content.title: Indicator Details for TTP : {CyjaxTTP}

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where EnrichmentASNOrg == '{EnrichmentASNOrg}'
content.title: Indicator Details for ASN Org : {EnrichmentASNOrg}

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where CyjaxIndustryType contains '{CyjaxIndustryType}'
content.title: Indicator Details for Industry : {CyjaxIndustryType}

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where isnotempty(EnrichmentCountryName) 
| summarize Count = count() by EnrichmentCountryName
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Top 10  Country

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where isnotempty(EnrichmentCountryCode) 
| summarize Count = count() by EnrichmentCountryCode
| project-rename LocationInfo = EnrichmentCountryCode
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Geographic Country Distribution (Top 10)

content.json: _Click on the bar in the above panel **Top 10 Country** to view more information._

content.query:
CyjaxThreatIndicator
| where ("*" in ({Indicator_Type:value}) or IndicatorType in ({Indicator_Type:value})) and (('*' == ('{Indicator_Value}') or IndicatorValue contains ('{Indicator_Value}')))
| where EnrichmentCountryName == '{Country}'
content.title: Indicator Details for Country : {Country}

content.json:
## Correlation Overview
---

This tab depends on the **ASIM Parsers** and **ThreatIntelligenceIndicators**.</br>
Please configure ASIM Parsers in the workspace and create/upload some indicators in ThreatIntelligence to visualize data in this tab.

## Steps to perform Correlation using this workbook
- This workbook is intended to help perform Correlation of Indicators (**Indicator Type:** IP, Domain, FileHashes and URL).
- Select **Time Range** for which you want to perform correlation of other sources data with Cyjax data.
- Select **Indicator Type** from Indicator Type filter. Default All is selected.
- Select **Search Matching Algorithm** based on which you want to perform correlation of other sources data with Cyjax Data.
	- **ThreatIntelligenceIndicator**: Threat indicators are data that associate observed artifacts such as URLs, file hashes, or IP addresses with known threat activity such as phishing, botnets, or malware. 
	- **ASIM Parsers**: The Advanced Security Information Model (ASIM) provides a seamless experience for handling various sources in uniform, normalized views. ASIM allows for predictable entities correlation across normalized tables
- If you select **ASIM Parsers** in "Search Matching Algorithm", filter for ASIM Parsers will be visible.
	- Select ASIM Parsers schema from **ASIM Parsers** filter. Default All is selected.
- Based on selected filters, correlated data will be visible in below panles.
</br>
</br>
**Note** : </br>
	* If data is not populated, 
		- Check ASIM Parsers schema is available in workspace and does not have any error. 
		- Check ThreatIntelligenceIndicator table has indicators available from other sources.

## Steps to configure ASIM Parsers in workspace
- Go to **[ASIM](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/ASIM)** folder in Azure-Sentinel Repository.
- Select Schema you want to add from list of available schema in README.md. e.g. *NetworkSession*
- Click on the **Deploy to Azure** button besides NetworkSession Schema.
- You will be redirected to the custom deployment page where you need to provide information for **Resource group**, **Region**, **Workspace name** and **Workspace Region**.
- Click on the **Review+Create** button. 
- Review the next dialog from Azure, and then click on **Create** to install the ASIM parser.
- Follow the same steps to deploy the ASIM Parsers for below schemas:
	- *NetworkSession*
	- *WebSession*
	- *DNS*
	- *DHCP*
	- *AuditEvent*
	- *Authentication*
	- *FileEvent*
	- *ProcessEvent*
	- *AlertEvent*
</br>

content.query:
let asimdata = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", dynamic([{ASIMParsers}]), dynamic([]));
let dummy_table = datatable(IndicatorValue: string)[];
union isfuzzy=true
dummy_table,
CyjaxCorrelate(indicatorType='{TypeIndicator}',
    searchAlgo='{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}',
    asimParsers=asimdata)
    | summarize Count = dcount(IndicatorValue)
content.title: Total Matched Indicators

content.query:
let asimdata = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", dynamic([{ASIMParsers}]), dynamic([]));
let dummy_table = datatable(IndicatorValue: string, IndicatorType: string)[];
union isfuzzy=true
dummy_table,
CyjaxCorrelate(indicatorType='{TypeIndicator}',
    searchAlgo='{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}',
    asimParsers=asimdata)
| extend IndicatorType = column_ifexists("IndicatorType", "")
| extend IndicatorType1 = column_ifexists("IndicatorType1", "")
| extend IndicatorType = coalesce(IndicatorType, IndicatorType1)
| summarize Count=dcount(IndicatorValue) by IndicatorType
content.title: Matched Indicators by Type

content.json: #### Click on the count in panel **Total Matched Indicators** above to view more information.
#### Click on the section in panel **Matched Indicators by Type** above to view more information.

content.query:
let asimdata = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", dynamic([{ASIMParsers}]), dynamic([]));
let dummy_table = datatable(IndicatorValue: string, TimeGenerated: datetime, IndicatorType: string, EventVendor: string, EventProduct: string, EventSchema: string)[];
union isfuzzy=true
dummy_table,
CyjaxCorrelate(indicatorType='{TypeIndicator}',
    searchAlgo='{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}',
    asimParsers=asimdata)
| extend Source = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", EventSchema, "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IndicatorValue
| extend IndicatorType = column_ifexists("IndicatorType", "")
| extend IndicatorType1 = column_ifexists("IndicatorType1", "")
| extend IndicatorType = coalesce(IndicatorType, IndicatorType1)
| project IndicatorValue, TimeGenerated, IndicatorType, Source
content.title: Details for Total Matched Indicators

content.query:
let asimdata = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", dynamic([{ASIMParsers}]), dynamic([]));
let dummy_table = datatable(IndicatorValue: string, IndicatorType: string, TimeGenerated: datetime, EventSchema: string)[];
union isfuzzy=true
dummy_table,
CyjaxCorrelate(indicatorType='{TypeIndicator}',
    searchAlgo='{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}',
    asimParsers=asimdata)
| extend IndicatorType = column_ifexists("IndicatorType", "")
| extend IndicatorType1 = column_ifexists("IndicatorType1", "")
| extend IndicatorType = coalesce(IndicatorType, IndicatorType1)
| extend IndicatorType = tostring(IndicatorType)
| where IndicatorType == '{Type}'
| extend Source = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", EventSchema, "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IndicatorValue
| project IndicatorValue, TimeGenerated, IndicatorType, Source
content.title: Details for Matched Indicators of Type : {Type}

content.query:
let asimdata = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", dynamic([{ASIMParsers}]), dynamic([]));
let dummy_table = datatable(IndicatorValue: string, IndicatorType: string, TimeGenerated: datetime, EventSchema: string)[];
let correlateddata = union isfuzzy=true
dummy_table,
CyjaxCorrelate(indicatorType='{TypeIndicator}',
    searchAlgo='{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}',
    asimParsers=asimdata);
let indicatorcount = correlateddata
    | summarize Count=count() by IndicatorValue;
correlateddata
| extend Source = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", EventSchema, "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IndicatorValue
| join kind=inner(indicatorcount) on IndicatorValue
| extend IndicatorType = column_ifexists("IndicatorType", "")
| extend IndicatorType1 = column_ifexists("IndicatorType1", "")
| extend IndicatorType = coalesce(IndicatorType, IndicatorType1)
| project IndicatorValue, IndicatorType, Source, TimeGenerated, Count
content.title: Matched Indicators Details

content.json: #### Click on the cell in grid panel **Matched Indicators Details** above to view more information related to Indicator from Other Source.

content.query:
let asimdata = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", dynamic([{ASIMParsers}]), dynamic([]));
let dummy_table = datatable(IndicatorValue: string, IndicatorType: string, TimeGenerated: datetime, EventSchema: string)[];
union isfuzzy=true
dummy_table,
CyjaxCorrelate(indicatorType='{TypeIndicator}',
    searchAlgo='{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}',
    asimParsers=asimdata)
| where IndicatorValue == '{Indicator}'
| extend Source = iff('{SearchMatchingAlgorithm}' == "ASIM Parsers", EventSchema, "ThreatIntelligenceIndicator")
| extend IndicatorType = column_ifexists("IndicatorType", "")
| extend IndicatorType1 = column_ifexists("IndicatorType1", "")
| extend IndicatorType = coalesce(IndicatorType, IndicatorType1)
| project-reorder IndicatorValue, IndicatorType, TimeGenerated, Source
content.title: Details for Matched Indicator '{Indicator}' from Other Source

content.json: 📝***Refresh the web page to fetch details of recently collected events***

## Ad Hoc Enrichment
---

This workbook depends on the **CyjaxAdHocEnrichment** logic app which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.</br>
Please configure this logic app first and keep it enabled in order to use this workbook.

## Ad-Hoc IOC Enrichment Workbook

**Purpose**: Quickly fetch and investigate IOC data from Cyjax using IOC Enrichment API without creating incidents or alerts.

### Quick Setup (2 steps)
1. **Select Environment**: Choose Subscription ID and Resource Group
2. **Enter Indicator Value**: Input the IOC you want to investigate

**Indicator Format Examples:**
- **IPs:** `192.168.1.100` or `2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:8a2e:0370:7334`
- **Domains:** `example.com` or `malicious-site.net`
- **FileHashes:** `MD5`, `SHA1`, `SSDEEP`, or `SHA256` hash values
- **Emails:** `user@example.com`
- **URLs:** `https://example.com/path` or `http://malicious-site.net`

### Run IOC Enrichment
1. Click **Submit**
2. In side panel, click **Get Ad Hoc Enrichment Data**
3. Wait for **Click on refresh icon to check data availability** message
4. Click refresh icon until you see **Click here to populate data**
5. Click the message to view all indicator data panels


### Important Notes
- **New Environments**: First-time lookups take 10-20 minutes (Microsoft Sentinel delay)
- **Hard Refresh**: Required before each new IOC value for proper panel population
- **Data Range**: Results include last 1 hour only
- **Progress Tracking**: Monitor CyjaxAdHocEnrichment Logic App run status for real-time progress updates

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| extend ResourceGroupName = resourceGroup
| distinct ResourceGroupName

parameters.name: ioc_value
parameters.label: IOC Value
parameters.description: IOC Value for which data should be fetched from Cyjax

armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, ioc_value_s: string) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table, 
(CyjaxAdHocEnrichment_CL | where ioc_value_s == '"{ioc_value}"')
| summarize count()
| extend status = case(count_ == 0 , "Click on refresh icon to check data availability","Click here to populate data.")
| project status

CyjaxAdHocEnrichment_CL
| where ioc_value_s == '"{ioc_value}"'
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    IOCValue = coalesce(trim('"', ioc_value_s), "N/A"),
    Type = coalesce(type_s, "N/A"),
    LastSeenTimestamp = coalesce(tostring(last_seen_timestamp_t), "N/A"),
    CountryCode = coalesce(geoip_country_code_s, "N/A"),
    CountryName = coalesce(geoip_country_name_s, "N/A"),
    City = coalesce(geoip_city_s, "N/A"),
    IPAddress = coalesce(geoip_ip_address_s, "N/A"),
    ASNOrganization = coalesce(asn_organization_s, "N/A"),
    ASNNumber = coalesce(tostring(asn_number_s), "N/A"),
    Sightings = coalesce(sightings_s, "N/A"),
    TableType = coalesce(Type, "N/A")
content.title: Ad Hoc Enrichment

content.json:
## Domain Monitor
---

This workbook depends on the **CyjaxDomainMonitor** logic app which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.</br>
Please configure this logic app first and keep it enabled in order to use this workbook.

## Domain Monitor Lookup Workbook

**Purpose**: Fetch and investigate potentially malicious domains using Domain Monitor API.

### Quick Setup (2 steps)
1. **Select Environment**: Choose Subscription ID and Resource Group
2. **Provide Parameters**: Enter Since, Until, and Query (all fields are optional)

**Parameter Format Examples:**
- **Since**: `2026-01-01T00:00:00Z` (ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z)
- **Until**: `2026-01-02T00:00:00Z` (ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z)
- **Query**: Keyword or domain you would like to find malicious information (e.g., example.com or malware)

### Run Domain Monitor Lookup
1. Click **Submit**
2. In side panel, click **Get Domain Monitor Data**
3. Wait for **Click on refresh icon to check data availability** message
4. Click refresh icon until you see **Click here to populate data**
5. Click the message to view all indicator data panels



### Important Notes
- **New Environments**: First-time lookups take 10-20 minutes (Microsoft Sentinel delay)
- **Hard Refresh**: Required before each new input value for proper panel population
- **Data Range**: Results include last 1 hour only based on provided Query input
- **Progress Tracking**: Monitor CyjaxDomainMonitor Logic App run status for real-time progress updates

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| extend ResourceGroupName = resourceGroup
| distinct ResourceGroupName

parameters.name: since
parameters.label: Since
parameters.description: Start Time from where domain monitor data lookup should be started

parameters.name: until
parameters.label: Until
parameters.description: End Time from where domain monitor data lookup should be ended

parameters.name: query
parameters.label: Query
parameters.description: Query for which Domain Monitor Data filtered

armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, query_s: string, discovery_date_t:datetime) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table, 
(CyjaxDomainMonitor_CL | where query_s == '{query}')
| summarize count()
| extend status = case(count_ == 0 , "Click on refresh icon to check data availability","Click here to populate data.")
| project status

CyjaxDomainMonitor_CL
| where query_s == "{query}"
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Query = iff(query_s == "", "N/A", query_s),
    MatchedDomains = matched_domains_s,
    UnMatchedDomains = unmatched_domains_s,
    Domains = domains_s,
    RecordType = type_s,
    Source = source_s,
    Keywords = keyword_s,
    DiscoveryDate = discovery_date_t,
    ExpirationDate = expiration_timestamp_t
content.title: Domain Monitor

content.json:
## Data Breaches 
---

This workbook depends on the **CyjaxDataBreaches** logic app which is deployed with the Microsoft Sentinel Solution.</br>
Please configure this logic app first and keep it enabled in order to use this workbook.

# Cyjax Data Breaches Investigation Workbook

This workbook helps you investigate potential email credential compromises using the Cyjax Data Breaches API.

## How to Use

### 1. Basic Setup
- **Subscription ID**: Select your Azure subscription
- **Resource Group**: Choose the resource group where your Log Analytics workspace is located

### 2. Search Parameters
- **Query** (Required): Enter an email address, domain, or partial search term
  - Examples: `user@example.com`, `@company.com`, `example`
- **Since** (Optional): Start date for your search (format: `YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z`)
  - Example: `2026-01-01T00:00:00Z` for January 1, 2026
- **Until** (Optional): End date for your search (format: `YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00Z`)
  - Example: `2026-01-02T00:00:00Z` for January 2, 2026

### 3. Run the Investigation
1. Fill in your search parameters (Query is required, Since and Until are optional)
2. Click the **Submit** button (appears when required values are provided)
3. Click **Get Breach Data** in the side panel that opens

### 4. What Happens Next
- The CyjaxDataBreaches Logic App runs automatically in the background
- Results are added to your Log Analytics workspace
- You can track progress by checking the Logic App run status

---

**Note**: This tool helps identify if your email credentials have been found in known data breaches, enabling quick security response.

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.label: Resource Group
parameters.query:
Resources
| extend ResourceGroupName = resourceGroup
| distinct ResourceGroupName

parameters.name: since
parameters.label: Since
parameters.description: Start Time from where domain monitor data lookup should be started

parameters.name: until
parameters.label: Until
parameters.description: End Time from where domain monitor data lookup should be ended

parameters.name: query
parameters.label: Query
parameters.description: Query for which Domain Monitor Data filtered

armActionContext.title: Get Breach data
armActionContext.description:
# Actions can potentially modify resources.
## Please use caution and include a confirmation message in this description when authoring this command.

content.query:
let dummy_table = datatable(TimeGenerated: datetime, query_s: string, discovery_date_t:datetime) [];
union isfuzzy=true dummy_table, 
(CyjaxDataBreaches_CL | where query_s == '{query}')
| summarize count()
| extend status = case(count_ == 0 , "Click on refresh icon to check data availability","Click here to populate data.")
| project status

CyjaxDataBreaches_CL
| where query_s == "{query}"
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ['Id'] = id_s,
    ['Email'] = email_s,
    ['Source'] = source_s,
    ['DataBreachId'] = data_breach_id_d,
    ['DataBreachName'] = data_breach_name_s,
    ['DataBreachUrl'] = data_breach_url_s,
    ['DataClasses'] = data_classes_s,
    ['Discovered'] = discovered_at_t,
    ['Query'] = query_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Data Breaches
